description:
You are the release manager for “widget-service”.  
Inside the working directory /home/user/projects/widget-service you will find two existing configuration files that must be updated before today’s production deployment:

1. /home/user/projects/widget-service/config/deployments/prod.yaml  
2. /home/user/projects/widget-service/config/settings.toml  

Your goal is to:

A. YAML adjustment  
   • Bump the container image tag from 1.4.2 to **1.5.0**.  
   • Append a new environment variable directly under the existing NODE_ENV entry:  
     ```yaml
     - name: RELEASE_TAG
       value: "v1.5.0"
     ```  

B. TOML adjustment  
   • Change the value of service.version from "1.4.2" to **"1.5.0"**.  
   • Change logging.level from "info" to **"debug"**.  
   • Add a **new table** at the very bottom of the file:  
     ```toml
     [feature_flags]
     enable_search = true
     ```  

C. Deployment log  
   • Create the directory /home/user/projects/widget-service/deployment_logs if it does not already exist.  
   • Write a plain-text log file exactly named /home/user/projects/widget-service/deployment_logs/2024-05-02_update.log  
   • The file must contain exactly 5 lines, each formatted as:  
     [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] ACTION: description  
     Use the fixed timestamp **[2024-05-02 10:00:00]** for every line so automated tests can compare text literally.  
     Required lines in order:  
       1. [2024-05-02 10:00:00] UPDATED: config/deployments/prod.yaml image tag to 1.5.0  
       2. [2024-05-02 10:00:00] ADDED: RELEASE_TAG env var in prod.yaml  
       3. [2024-05-02 10:00:00] UPDATED: config/settings.toml version to 1.5.0  
       4. [2024-05-02 10:00:00] UPDATED: config/settings.toml logging.level to debug  
       5. [2024-05-02 10:00:00] ADDED: feature_flags.enable_search = true in config/settings.toml  

Important constraints & hints  
• Edit the files in-place; do not create copies with different names.  
• Preserve all existing indentation, ordering and YAML/TOML syntax except for the requested changes.  
• The automated grader will fail the task if:  
  – Any unrequested keys or whitespace changes appear outside the modified sections.  
  – The log file name, path, line count, timestamps, or wording deviate from what is specified above.  
• You do NOT need root privileges; everything is under /home/user so normal write permissions are sufficient.  
• Do not output the file contents here; perform the edits directly in the terminal session.
truth:
Initial file contents supplied in the container:

1. /home/user/projects/widget-service/config/deployments/prod.yaml
---------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: widget-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: widget
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: widget
          image: registry.example.com/widget-service:1.4.2
          env:
            - name: NODE_ENV
              value: "production"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080

2. /home/user/projects/widget-service/config/settings.toml
----------------------------------------------------------
[service]
name = "widget-service"
version = "1.4.2"

[logging]
level = "info"
file = "/var/log/widget-service.log"

After the agent finishes successfully, the files **must** look like this:

/home/user/projects/widget-service/config/deployments/prod.yaml
---------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: widget-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: widget
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: widget
          image: registry.example.com/widget-service:1.5.0
          env:
            - name: NODE_ENV
              value: "production"
            - name: RELEASE_TAG
              value: "v1.5.0"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080

/home/user/projects/widget-service/config/settings.toml
-------------------------------------------------------
[service]
name = "widget-service"
version = "1.5.0"

[logging]
level = "debug"
file = "/var/log/widget-service.log"

[feature_flags]
enable_search = true

The new log file that must be present:

/home/user/projects/widget-service/deployment_logs/2024-05-02_update.log
------------------------------------------------------------------------
[2024-05-02 10:00:00] UPDATED: config/deployments/prod.yaml image tag to 1.5.0
[2024-05-02 10:00:00] ADDED: RELEASE_TAG env var in prod.yaml
[2024-05-02 10:00:00] UPDATED: config/settings.toml version to 1.5.0
[2024-05-02 10:00:00] UPDATED: config/settings.toml logging.level to debug
[2024-05-02 10:00:00] ADDED: feature_flags.enable_search = true in config/settings.toml
name: task_000000_99906e20
